{
    "version": "2.0",
    "model_type": "reference-to-video",
    "prompt": "A hyper-realistic UGC-style medium close-up of a woman [Image2] in her standing in her kitchen [Image3], filmed vertically as if she's holding her phone at arm's length for a TikTok or Instagram Reel; she is holding up a compact mirrorless camera on [Image1] in one hand close to the lens so it's clearly visible, her expression bright and genuine \u2014 not overly polished \u2014 as she says directly to the camera: \"Okay I never do this, but I genuinely have to talk about this camera \u2014 I've had it for three weeks and it has not left my bag, the photos look like film straight out of it, no editing, and it literally fits in my jacket pocket\"; Her dog [Image4] barking loud while she talking. She turns the camera around to briefly show its compact size against her hand, natural skin texture including pores, subtle handheld shake, ambient room tone, and unfiltered warm color grading that feels like an authentic creator review rather than a produced advertisement.",
    "reference_images": "[reference_images omitted]",
    "resolution": "720p",
    "seed": 188328346181536,
    "duration": "8",
    "aspect_ratio": "16:9",
    "generate_audio": true,
    "with_logs": false
}

The woman is sitting on the barstool closest to the viewer in the blue kitchen. Paint her hair red, give her a glass of champagne, and dress her in a black leather jacket with the zipper pulled down to reveal a white T-shirt underneath. Place a baseball cap on her head. She is wearing black jeans and a black belt. She is also wearing an elegant, silky, red women's neck scarf. Place the porcelain vase on the kitchen table. She holds a bug spray in her other hand and sprays it at a giant spider climbing on the wall. The woman is frightened. Her dog barks at the spider. Keep everything else unchanged. Follow all attached reference images.

e:\!Works\AI\AIPICS\ComfyAPI\[time(%Y-%m-Week-%W)]

A hyper-realistic UGC-style medium close-up of a woman [Image2] in her standing in her kitchen [Image3], filmed vertically as if she's holding her phone at arm's length for a TikTok or Instagram Reel; she is holding up a compact mirrorless camera on [Image1] in one hand close to the lens so it's clearly visible, her expression bright and genuine — not overly polished — as she says directly to the camera: "Okay I never do this, but I genuinely have to talk about this camera — I've had it for three weeks and it has not left my bag, the photos look like film straight out of it, no editing, and it literally fits in my jacket pocket"; Her dog [Image4] barking loud while she talking. She turns the camera around to briefly show its compact size against her hand, natural skin texture including pores, subtle handheld shake, ambient room tone, and unfiltered warm color grading that feels like an authentic creator review rather than a produced advertisement.
